About Work Services Contact Available 2025

Stylist & Art Director

I'm Corrine Kaenzig — a freelance stylist and art director focused on set styling and brand visual identity.

After thirteen years in film and television, across both styling and costume, innovation and a sharp eye for detail now drive my art direction work — built over the last five years.

I believe the work should be concept-driven, with impact that lasts. Strategic, empathic, daring and playful, the goal is to spark genuine curiosity rather than just please the eye. Decisive planning and close client consultation keep the brand vision intact from first meeting to final delivery — on target and on budget.

Work with me →

Projects

Concept-led work, made to last — strategic, empathic, daring and playful.

01

Art Direction

Visual direction and on-set creative for campaigns across broadcast, social, web and out-of-home.

02

Fashion Styling

Editorial, e-commerce and presenter styling — sourcing, brand liaison and on-set decisions.

03

Costume Design

Character costume, making and continuity for film and television formats.

04

Set Dressing

Building and dressing sets, sourcing props and composing scenes that hold across formats.

05

Consulting

Translating brand objectives into clear visual outcomes, on time and on budget.
